items.name: Gucci Ophidia GG Backpack
items.description: With a hiking pack-inspired shape, the medium-sized backpack is crafted in GG Supreme canvas contrasted with technical mesh details. A classic combination of the House's most recognizable elements—the GG motif and Web stripe—the world of Ophidia continues to evolve, incorporating new shapes and silhouettes. items.name: Gucci Savoy Small Hat Box
items.description: This item is part of the Gucci Savoy line, a selection of travel pieces that pay homage to Guccio Gucci’s beginnings as a porter at the London hotel. This small hat box combines vintage-inspired details with emblematic House codes. The GG logo continues to be an established symbol, while the Web stripe pays homage to Gucci's equestrian roots. The style is completed by brown leather details.

items.name: Frayed Cap
items.description: A one-of-a-kind hat that embodies the essence of 90s fashion. This unique piece holds an exceptional value as it is a never-used prototype, adding to its rarity and appeal. The cap features a striking combination of black and denim, creating a stylish and versatile look. With its frayed edges and distressed detailing, it exudes a sense of effortless coolness and urban flair. This hat captures the spirit of the 90s, a decade known for its grunge, hip-hop, and streetwear influences. It is a coveted item for fashion enthusiasts and collectors seeking to embrace a nostalgic aesthetic.
